series_title.ja: マスカレード・コンフィデンス　詐欺師は少女と仮面仕掛けの旅をする 【電子特典付き】
series_title.en: マスカレード・コンフィデンス　詐欺師は少女と仮面仕掛けの旅をする 【電子特典付き】

volumes_registered.title: マスカレード・コンフィデンス　詐欺師は少女と仮面仕掛けの旅をする 【電子特典付き】

world_setting.label: A post-revolution republic with advanced technology (steam engines) and supernatural abilities (Regalia), where a con artist and a soul-reading girl embark on a journey.

honorifics.policy: Honorifics are generally localized to convey equivalent social dynamics and respect levels in English. Exceptions may be made for specific cultural terms or character-defining speech patterns, which will be noted in individual character profiles or cultural terms.

name_order.policy: Use Family Given order for Japanese names by default; preserve canonical spelling. Use Given Family only for explicit non-Japanese exceptions.

keigo.notes: Maintains a casual, contemporary voice, but can shift to formal or charming registers when playing a role. His true voice is often cynical but reveals underlying care for those he travels with.

visual_identity_non_color.identity_summary: Adaptable appearance due to his con artist nature; often seen in tailored, unassuming clothing when in a persona; sometimes wears fashion glasses. His default expression is likely observant and slightly wary. His posture is often relaxed but ready, reflecting his quick wit and evasive nature.

ライナス＝クルーガー.notes: Cunning, pragmatic, resourceful, adaptable, cynical, observant, protective (especially of Chronica), driven by money and self-interest, but with a hidden sense of justice.

00f6.relationship_to_others: Mentor/Older brother figure to Chronica; former 'husband' to Elzaria Lorelei (as Arthur Tickborne); 'business partner' to Willem; 'legal expert' persona (John Law); target of Eiselred Grachiel; ally to Johann, Evelyn, and Patrizia.

keigo_switch.notes: Maintains a casual, contemporary voice, but can shift to formal or charming registers when playing a role. His true voice is often cynical but reveals underlying care for those he travels with.

00f6.character_arc: Initially driven by revenge and reclaiming wealth, gradually develops a protective bond with Chronica, confronting his own past and identity along the journey.

クロニカ.category: Travel companion, 'master' (she forces Linus to travel with her), love interest (implied).

visual_identity_non_color.identity_summary: Small stature, long hair that shifts from a dark hue to silvery-white, distinct heterochromia (one emerald green eye, one amethyst eye), often wears a frilly black skirt or a white sleeveless shirt with a wide-brimmed white hat. Her expression can range from innocent curiosity to unsettling perceptiveness. She often carries a thick diary.

クロニカ.notes: Mysterious, innocent-seeming but manipulative, perceptive, curious, enjoys good food and beautiful scenery, has a hidden strength and purpose.

keigo.notes: Her speech is generally light and often playful, but she can deliver serious or profound statements with an unsettling directness, especially when discussing her abilities or past.

00f6.relationship_to_protagonist: Travel companion, 'master' (she forces Linus to travel with her), love interest (implied).
00f6.relationship_to_others: Target of the Knights; has a mysterious past related to the 'King' and Regalia.

emotional_shifts.vulnerability: trembling voice, often accompanied by tears or a strained smile

keigo_switch.notes: Her speech is generally light and often playful, but she can deliver serious or profound statements with an unsettling directness, especially when discussing her abilities or past.

00f6.character_arc: Seeks to reach the sea and uncover her past/purpose, which is tied to the 'King' and the Regalia. Develops a bond with Linus, learning to trust and rely on him.

イヴリーン＝ハベルハバル.category: Antagonist turned reluctant ally/escort. Works for the government.

keigo.notes: Maintains a formal, almost robotic tone, reflecting her military background and stoic personality. Rarely shows overt emotion.

visual_identity_non_color.identity_summary: Black hair, wears a traditional black and white maid uniform. Her posture is rigid and formal, and her expression is typically stoic and unreadable. She often wields hatchets in combat.

イヴリーン＝ハベルハバル.notes: Cold, stoic, professional, highly skilled, somewhat exasperated by Linus and Chronica, but ultimately follows her mission.

00f6.relationship_to_protagonist: Antagonist turned reluctant ally/escort. Works for the government.
00f6.relationship_to_others: Disciple of Aria; former member of the 'Black Brooms' assassination squad; tasked with protecting/monitoring Chronica.

keigo_switch.notes: Maintains a formal, almost robotic tone, reflecting her military background and stoic personality. Rarely shows overt emotion.

00f6.character_arc: Initially an antagonist sent to capture Chronica, she becomes a reluctant protector/escort due to orders, slowly developing a more complex relationship with the protagonists.

パトリツィア＝ウシュケーン.affiliation: Republic of Colonials (Southern Four Great Ducal Houses)

keigo.notes: Her speech is characterized by its dramatic flair and often exaggerated politeness, reflecting her noble upbringing and theatrical personality.

visual_identity_non_color.identity_summary: Golden, flowing hair, often wears elaborate dresses or elegant attire, giving her a regal and somewhat dramatic silhouette. Her expressions are often lively and exaggerated, reflecting her theatrical personality. She projects an air of confidence, sometimes bordering on arrogance.

パトリツィア＝ウシュケーン.notes: Flamboyant, dramatic, somewhat naive but determined, easily flustered, has a strong sense of pride and a romanticized view of life.

00f6.relationship_to_others: Daughter of a wealthy noble family; new member of the Knights; 'fiancée' of Linus (as part of a scam).

keigo_switch.notes: Her speech is characterized by its dramatic flair and often exaggerated politeness, reflecting her noble upbringing and theatrical personality.

00f6.character_arc: Introduced as a Knight pursuing Chronica, she is defeated by Linus and Evelyn, then becomes an unexpected ally, joining their journey.

visual_identity_non_color.identity_summary: Long crimson hair, typically wears a maid uniform. Her appearance can shift from elderly to youthful due to her abilities. Her posture is graceful and powerful, and her expression is often knowing or subtly amused.

アリア.notes: Powerful, enigmatic, somewhat playful, highly skilled in combat, has a strong sense of duty and loyalty.

keigo.notes: Her speech is refined and poised, even when engaging in combat or teasing her disciple. She maintains an air of control.

00f6.relationship_to_others: Master of Evelyn Habelhabal; former leader/strongest member of the 'Black Brooms' assassination squad; owner of a restaurant.

keigo_switch.notes: Her speech is refined and poised, even when engaging in combat or teasing her disciple. She maintains an air of control.

00f6.character_arc: Revealed as Evelyn's powerful master, she aids the protagonists against Sherry Gordon, then returns to her restaurant.

visual_identity_non_color.identity_summary: Large, muscular physique, often seen carrying a steel steam engine and gatling guns on his back. His expression is typically stern or determined, and his posture is powerful and unyielding.

ヨハン.notes: Gruff, pragmatic, loyal, physically imposing, but with a hidden softer side.

keigo.notes: His speech is straightforward and unadorned, reflecting his no-nonsense attitude and military background.

00f6.relationship_to_others: Linus's older brother figure/mentor; former military.

keigo_switch.notes: His speech is straightforward and unadorned, reflecting his no-nonsense attitude and military background.

00f6.character_arc: Introduced as a former military figure who aids Linus, providing a powerful combat presence.

keigo.notes: A polished and endearing speaking style, designed to win trust and affection.

visual_identity_non_color.identity_summary: Refined and well-groomed, typically wearing formal attire. His expression is often gentle and reassuring, and his posture is confident and open, designed to inspire trust.

アーサー＝ティクボーン.notes: Charming, diligent, seemingly loving, successful investor.

keigo_switch.notes: A polished and endearing speaking style, designed to win trust and affection.

00f6.character_arc: A temporary persona used by Linus for a scam.

keigo.notes: Her speech reflects her sheltered upbringing and trusting nature, becoming more candid when she feels safe and loved.

visual_identity_non_color.identity_summary: Long, flowing flaxen hair. Her clothing is likely modest but of good quality, reflecting her noble background. Her expression is often gentle and somewhat naive, and her posture is demure.

エルザリア＝ローレライ.notes: Naive, romantic, easily charmed, somewhat sheltered.

00f6.relationship_to_others: Daughter of a rural noble family.

keigo_switch.notes: Her speech reflects her sheltered upbringing and trusting nature, becoming more candid when she feels safe and loved.

00f6.character_arc: Victim of Linus's initial scam, her fate after the scam is not detailed.

visual_identity_non_color.identity_summary: Portly figure, typically dressed in a suit, often seen with a cigar. His expression is usually shrewd and calculating, and his posture is relaxed but commanding.

keigo.notes: His speech is typical of a businessman, focused on profit and risk.

keigo_switch.notes: His speech is typical of a businessman, focused on profit and risk.

00f6.character_arc: Target of Linus's scam, illustrating Linus's methods.

keigo.notes: A confident and articulate speaking style, fitting for a legal professional.

visual_identity_non_color.identity_summary: Wears fashion glasses, presenting a scholarly or professional appearance. His attire is likely business-appropriate, and his expression is confident and intelligent.

keigo_switch.notes: A confident and articulate speaking style, fitting for a legal professional.

00f6.character_arc: A temporary persona used by Linus for a scam.

keigo.notes: His speech is characterized by its formal, almost archaic tone, combined with a deep, unsettling menace, reflecting his aristocratic background and sadistic nature.

visual_identity_non_color.identity_summary: Pathologically thin physique, wears a long coat, has tawny hair and round black eyes. His expression is often sinister and contemptuous, and his posture is typically hunched or unnaturally still, conveying a predatory aura.

アイゼルレッド＝グラキエル.notes: Cruel, arrogant, sadistic, believes in noble supremacy, enjoys inflicting pain.

keigo_switch.notes: His speech is characterized by its formal, almost archaic tone, combined with a deep, unsettling menace, reflecting his aristocratic background and sadistic nature.

00f6.character_arc: An early antagonist who attacks Linus and Chronica on the train, demonstrating the threat of the Knights.

keigo.notes: His speech is overtly polite and theatrical, masking his true intentions and manipulative nature.

visual_identity_non_color.identity_summary: Likely a well-dressed, imposing figure, given his status as a wealthy businessman and party host. His expressions are probably smooth and calculating, and his posture one of authority.

keigo_switch.notes: His speech is overtly polite and theatrical, masking his true intentions and manipulative nature.

00f6.character_arc: An antagonist who attempts to use Chronica for his own ends, defeated by Aria.

visual_identity_non_color.identity_summary: Adaptable appearance due to his con artist nature; often seen in tailored, unassuming clothing when in a persona; sometimes wears fashion glasses. His default expression is likely observant and slightly wary. His posture is often relaxed but ready, reflecting his quick wit and evasive nature.
